name: ASRock B760M PG SONIC WiFi Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7200(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - eDP - Dragon 2.5G LAN - Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax
shortName: ASRock B760M PG SONIC WiFi Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR5 support, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 6E.
